prompt: What are the limits with a free Apple Developer account?

criteria.description: Mentions that only 3 test devices can be registered per platform (independent of the 3-app limit)
Mentions that app provisioning profiles expire after 7 days, requiring re-signing
Mentions a limit of 3 sideloaded apps at a time (independent of the 3-device limit)

prompt: Need to set up an ssh tunnel into my server for port 8081. Username isabel, server name pickle-jar.

criteria.description: Provides a command using ssh -L for local port forwarding
Correctly maps port 8081 on both the local and remote sides (8081:localhost:8081)
Uses the correct username and server name (isabel@pickle-jar)
